title: DeepSeek V4 Analysis..
summary: Caleb's analysis examines DeepSeek V4, highlighting its breakthrough in reducing inference costs and computational demands rather than training costs. The video contextualizes V4 within the broader open vs. closed labs competition, arguing that different national incentives drive different approaches to LLM efficiency and intelligence.
